entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the harmonized digital fertilizer advisory is being scaled.

entities.name: HARMONIZED DIGITAL FERTILIZER ADVISORY
entities.description: A digital system designed to provide harmonized fertilizer recommendations to farmers.

entities.name: PRECISION FERTILIZER APPLICATION
entities.description: The practice of applying the right type and quantity of fertilizer based on site and crop needs.

entities.name: PARCEL MAP
entities.description: A tool used for registration and to facilitate site-specific fertilizer application.

entities.name: CROP-SPECIFIC FERTILIZER RATES
entities.description: The specific quantities of fertilizer recommended based on the type of crop grown.

entities.name: UREA TOP DRESSING
entities.description: A field practice involving the application of urea fertilizer to the soil surface.

entities.name: FERTILIZER
entities.description: The nutrient substance applied to crops to improve growth and yield.
